steps.title: Apply the multiplier from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $24x = 6 \cdot 3 = 18$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. It's given that $4x=3$. Multiplying each side of this equation by $6$ yields $24x=18$. Therefore, the value of $24x$ is $18$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $6x$, not $24x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $8x$, not $24x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $96x$, not $24x$.
